entries.name: Guiding
entries.definition: You lead others along their path with wisdom and care.

entries.name: Testing
entries.definition: You challenge seekers to prove their worth and growth.

entries.name: Teaching
entries.definition: You impart knowledge and understanding systematically.

entries.name: Protecting
entries.definition: You shield and defend those under your care.

entries.name: Inspiring
entries.definition: You kindle the divine spark in others through example.

entries.name: Challenging
entries.definition: You push boundaries to catalyze growth and change.

entries.name: Prophesying
entries.definition: You reveal glimpses of potential futures and paths.

entries.name: Blessing
entries.definition: You bestow divine favor and empowerment.

entries.name: Healing
entries.definition: You mend wounds of body, mind, and spirit.

entries.name: Empowering
entries.definition: You strengthen others' innate divine abilities.

entries.name: Initiating
entries.definition: You open doorways to new levels of understanding.

entries.name: Purifying
entries.definition: You cleanse and refine the essence of being.

entries.name: Illuminating
entries.definition: You shine light on hidden truths and mysteries.
